acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Candidate direct capture APIs/tools were identified.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: tools-and-protocols.md lists local tools and active direct-capture globals.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Bounded live probe used a node-scoped generated Hyprland output and collected cleanup evidence.

acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validation-summary.json records size, format, modifier, timestamp, sync mode, and explicit sync-fd availability.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Implementation path or blocker was documented.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: notes.md documents the direct ext-image-copy-capture implementation path; no blocker.md was needed because an implicit-sync path is viable.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Live host probes proved generated-output lifecycle, Wayland output discovery, legacy direct targetability, and cleanup.
